title: 高松宮記念の後に・奮い立て

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The electrifying sprint across 1,200 meters of turf
goes by in a flash. Before I know what's
happening, the view ahead grows crowded.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
They all rush past the finish line in what seems like
an instant. Compared to them, my speed...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: My form... is embarrassingly poor.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Keep your head up.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...King?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We're still on the turf. That means we still have a
responsibility to run with all our might.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If you truly wish to learn from me, then steel
yourself and watch me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Keep your eyes on me until the very end.

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
King Halo?! You realize this is the winner's circle,
right?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I know full well. Normally, I wouldn't have any
right to stand here after today's result.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: However, there's something I need to say.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
You lost, King Halo! What are you trying to
prove?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Her running today lacked its usual brilliance.
Maybe she's past her prime...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Forcing herself into the winner's circle? What a
sore loser. Quit fiending for the spotlight and
step aside for the newer generation.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Listen well!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm granting you all the right to hear me speak.
Racing is a world of victory and defeat.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Results are everything. That means today I am a
loser who had her dream of victory shattered.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
However, I am proud that I chose to enter this
race, and I do not feel I was selfish in the
slightest!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You may try, but you'll never make me feel
ashamed!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Because deciding to take on today's challenge
was the choice that best represents me as a
person!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I take pride in making choices that represent who
I am! No matter what anyone else may say, this is
the path I tread!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's all I have to say. So please go ahead and
celebrate the Umamusume who won today.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: King Halo's so cool...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, no one can be like her. She's like... a real
living king.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Kawakami?
...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I thought you wouldn't want to see that. Didn't I
look pitiful?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I've disgraced your expectations... You probably
feel hurt.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No, of course not! There's no way I'd feel that
way!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I see... I'm not sure if that's lip service or not, but
it won't change what I say, nor how I'll act.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If the day ever comes when we compete again, I'll
go all out and give you a good thrashing.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I won't hold back against any opponent, no
matter how uncouth it may seem. That's how I
show respect to those who challenge me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Right. I'm looking forward to racing you again!
choice_data_list: Have you worked out your ideal self?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course. The answer was within me all
along.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some days later, Kawakami Princess comes to me
with a proposal.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Before the Takamatsunomiya Kinen, King asked
me whether I felt pride in myself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Whether I could take pride in my own actions.
Whether they reflect my true self.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
King's words made me realize something—staying
true to myself doesn't mean I'm being
self-centered. So I'll keep on moving forward...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: No matter what anyone else might think of me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, for next month's Fan Fest, I want to take
part in this event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess shows me a plan for a stage
event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Last Year's Tiara Tour in Retrospect!" A talk
show presented by glamorous Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It seems the Umamusume I competed against last
year will be there, as well as all their fans.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A true princess wouldn't back down from an
opportunity like this just because she felt
intimidated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I see sincere determination burning in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But somewhere deeper, I sense a subtle tremor, a
trembling accompanied by an eagerness to grow.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Right.
